scripts.eval:classification: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json
scripts.eval:reasoning: promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
scripts.eval:cerebras: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers cerebras --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers cerebras --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
scripts.eval:cloudflare: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
scripts.eval:fresh: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
